title: ETL Card Node (v0)
description: Base schema for one card in etl.json. Required set is the EXTRACT-phase minimum; later phases tighten it via the per-phase variants noted in design-spec.md section 6. The three scoring axes (weight, impact, reuse) live on the OTAG, never on the card; contribution = weight * impact * reuse_multiplier.

effective_tags.description: Derived by script in NormalizeNode; required after phase 2.

official.description: true = real Scryfall otag (fetch-locked). false = custom/local tag; legal only if registered + user-approved in vocabulary.custom_vocab.

source.description: fetch = written by extraction script (re-fetch must reproduce). agent = proposed in proposed.json. derived = computed by script.

inherits.description: Ancestor tags from the tagger DAG. Required for official tags.

weight.description: Applicability of this otag to the card: 0 = doesn't really apply, 0.5 = partial, 1 = fully. Agent-proposed, script-validated. Required after phase 3 (Judge).

impact.description: Magnitude of the effect's game swing in this role: 0 = negligible, 5 = game-defining. Agent-proposed, script-validated. Required after phase 3 (Judge).

reuse.description: How often this otag's effect can fire. Drives reuse_multiplier.

reuse_multiplier.description: Must match reuse per the lookup table (validate.py enforces): at-will 1.0 / once-per-turn 0.7 / mono-use 0.5. Contribution = weight * impact * reuse_multiplier.

conditional.description: If weight or impact is reduced for a setup requirement, the human-readable reason.

contribute_candidate.description: true when the oracle implies a function no official otag covers (propose upstream to Scryfall).
